message:
feat(search): add vector similarity module with frankensearch-embed integration

Add vector.rs module implementing vector similarity search primitives
(cosine similarity, dot product, L2 distance) for hybrid retrieval
in xf's search pipeline. Integrates frankensearch-embed as a shared
dependency for consistent embedding generation across the tool suite.

- Add src/vector.rs with similarity computation functions (40 lines)
- Add frankensearch-embed git dependency in Cargo.toml
- Regenerate Cargo.lock with frankensearch workspace transitive deps
  (396 line delta from frankensearch-core, franken-kernel,
  franken-evidence, franken-decision, asupersync, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
